name: Protein Properties
description: Calculate a variety of properties on your protein sequences or structures. Sequence properties: Amino Acids Percent, Molecular Weight, Aromaticity, Instability Index, Average Flexibility, GRAVY, Isoelectric Point, Charge at pH 7, Helix Fraction, Turn Fraction, Sheet Fraction, Molar Extinction Coefficient. Structure properties: Surface Hydrophobicity, Solvent Accessible Surface Areas, Relative Accessible Surface Areas, Half-Sphere Exposure Calculations, Residue Depth.
capabilities: Calculate a variety of properties on your protein sequences or structures

Sequence properties: Amino Acids Percent, Molecular Weight, Aromaticity, Instability Index, Average Flexibility, GRAVY, Isoelectric Point, Charge at pH 7, Helix Fraction, Turn Fraction, Sheet Fraction, Molar Extinction Coefficient
Structure properties: Surface Hydrophobicity, Solvent Accessible Surface Areas, Relative Accessible Surface Areas, Half-Sphere Exposure Calculations, Residue Depth

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for sequence-based property calculations (molecular weight, aromaticity, GRAVY, etc.)

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for structure-based property calculations (surface hydrophobicity, SASA, residue depth, etc.)
